prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(detect_and_register_portfolio source_account_1)
(attach_transition_request_to_portfolio source_account_1 transition_request_a)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(validate_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(attach_candidate_security_to_source_bucket source_account_1 source_bucket_1 candidate_security_1)
(confirm_candidate_security_for_account_bucket source_account_1 source_bucket_1 target_model_1 candidate_security_1)
(detect_and_register_portfolio target_account_1)
(attach_transition_request_to_portfolio target_account_1 transition_request_b)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio target_account_1 target_model_1)
(validate_portfolio target_account_1 target_model_1)
(attach_candidate_security_to_target_bucket target_account_1 target_bucket_1 candidate_security_1)
(confirm_candidate_security_for_target_bucket target_account_1 target_bucket_1 target_model_1 candidate_security_1)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio target_account_1 target_model_1)
(assemble_trade_ticket source_account_1 target_account_1 source_bucket_1 target_bucket_1 trade_ticket_1)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(match_trade_ticket_to_holdings trade_ticket_1 source_account_1 target_model_1)
(finalize_source_account_assignment source_account_1 trade_ticket_1)
(finalize_target_account_assignment target_account_1 trade_ticket_1)
(detect_and_register_portfolio transition_plan_alpha)
(attach_transition_request_to_portfolio transition_plan_alpha transition_request_c)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio transition_plan_alpha target_model_1)
(validate_portfolio transition_plan_alpha target_model_1)
(bind_holding_lot_to_plan_and_ticket transition_plan_alpha holding_lot_1 trade_ticket_1)
(prepare_plan_for_venue_assignment transition_plan_alpha holding_lot_1 trade_ticket_1 target_model_1)
(attach_settlement_instruction_to_plan transition_plan_alpha settlement_instruction_primary)
(assign_operator_to_portfolio transition_plan_alpha operator_1)
(attach_approval_document_to_plan transition_plan_alpha approval_document_1)
(run_plan_execution_readiness_check_sell_leg transition_plan_alpha settlement_instruction_primary operator_1 holding_lot_1 trade_ticket_1)
(collect_approval_for_plan transition_plan_alpha approval_document_1 holding_lot_1 trade_ticket_1)
(finalize_plan_post_approval transition_plan_alpha)
(attach_transition_window_to_portfolio transition_plan_alpha transition_window_1 target_model_1)
(assign_transition_request_to_plan transition_plan_alpha transition_request_c transition_window_1)
(detach_settlement_instruction_from_plan transition_plan_alpha settlement_instruction_primary)
(detach_approval_document_to_plan transition_plan_alpha approval_document_1)
(unassign_operator_from_portfolio transition_plan_alpha operator_1)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio transition_plan_alpha target_model_1)
(detect_and_register_portfolio transition_plan_beta)
(attach_transition_request_to_portfolio transition_plan_beta transition_request_c)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio transition_plan_beta target_model_1)
(validate_portfolio transition_plan_beta target_model_1)
(bind_holding_lot_to_plan_and_ticket transition_plan_beta holding_lot_2 trade_ticket_1)
(prepare_plan_for_venue_assignment transition_plan_beta holding_lot_2 trade_ticket_1 target_model_1)
(attach_settlement_instruction_to_plan transition_plan_beta settlement_instruction_primary)
(assign_operator_to_portfolio transition_plan_beta operator_1)
(attach_approval_document_to_plan transition_plan_beta approval_document_1)
(run_plan_execution_readiness_check_sell_leg transition_plan_beta settlement_instruction_primary operator_1 holding_lot_2 trade_ticket_1)
(collect_approval_for_plan transition_plan_beta approval_document_1 holding_lot_2 trade_ticket_1)
(finalize_plan_post_approval transition_plan_beta)
(attach_transition_window_to_portfolio transition_plan_beta transition_window_1 target_model_1)
(assign_transition_request_to_plan transition_plan_beta transition_request_c transition_window_1)
(detach_settlement_instruction_from_plan transition_plan_beta settlement_instruction_primary)
(detach_approval_document_to_plan transition_plan_beta approval_document_1)
(unassign_operator_from_portfolio transition_plan_beta operator_1)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio transition_plan_beta target_model_1)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(attach_transition_window_to_portfolio source_account_1 transition_window_1 target_model_1)
(assign_transition_request_to_source_account source_account_1 transition_request_a transition_window_1)
(unassign_target_model_from_portfolio source_account_1 target_model_1)
(assign_target_model_to_portfolio target_account_1 target_model_1)
(attach_transition_window_to_portfolio target_account_1 transition_window_1 target_model_1)
(assign_transition_request_to_target_account target_account_1 transition_request_b transition_window_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem is a PDDL planning problem for portfolio transition planning. The goal is to make source_account_1, target_account_1, transition_plan_alpha, and transition_plan_beta all "assigned_for_transition".


## Identifying Problem Details  
- The task is a PDDL planning problem focused on portfolio transition planning.  
- The goal involves ensuring source_account_1, target_account_1, transition_plan_alpha, and transition_plan_beta are all "assigned_for_transition."

## Identifying Problem Details  
- All entities—source_account_1, target_account_1, transition_plan_alpha, and transition_plan_beta—are portfolios, part of portfolio_account_group or portfolio_plan_group.  
- Actions like attach_transition_window_to_portfolio apply to any portfolio, requiring readiness for execution and mapping to a target model.  

## Checking Transition Window Availability  
- Only one transition_window_1 is available, which complicates attaching windows to multiple portfolios.  
- Assign actions may release and reuse the transition window, suggesting a sequential process.  

## Exploring Readiness Conditions  
- Portfolios need "ready_for_execution" to attach a transition window, set by actions like finalize_source_account_assignment for accounts.  
- For transition plans, readiness involves actions like finalize_plan_post_approval, while accounts require ticket assembly and matching.  

## Analyzing Initial State  
- Initial state shows no portfolios registered, with available resources like transition_request_a, target_model_1, and operator_1.  
- Connections exist, such as source_account_1 matching source_bucket_1 and plans including specific accounts and trade tickets.

## Exploring Readiness Paths  
- Portfolios need "ready_for_ticket_assembly" to proceed, achieved via two paths: attaching a candidate security or reserving for lot selection.  
- Attaching a candidate security (attach_candidate_security_to_source_bucket) marks the ticket and sets the bucket as having a candidate, requiring validation and mapping.  

- Confirming the candidate security (confirm_candidate_security_for_account_bucket) then sets "ready_for_ticket_assembly," needing the account mapped to a target model.  
- Alternatively, reserve_source_account_for_lot_selection sets both ticket_marked and ready_for_assembly, but requires the bucket already marked.  

## Outlining Registration Steps  
- Portfolios must be registered (detect_and_register_portfolio) before attaching requests or models, requiring no prior registration or assignment.  
- Attaching a transition request (attach_transition_request_to_portfolio) needs a registered portfolio and an available request, marking it as attached.  

- Assigning a target model (assign_target_model_to_portfolio) requires a registered portfolio and available target model, setting the mapping.  
- Validating the portfolio (validate_portfolio) needs mapping and attachment, setting "validated_for_transition."

## Examining Security Attachments  
- Attaching candidate security (e.g., candidate_security_1) to source or target buckets sets readiness flags like ticket_marked and bucket_marked.  
- Confirming candidate security for a bucket releases the security, keeping source_bucket_has_candidate intact, which may affect trade ticket assembly options.  

## Assessing Trade Ticket Assembly  
- Assembling a trade ticket (e.g., trade_ticket_1) requires both source and target accounts to be ready for assembly, with buckets marked.  
- The simple assemble_trade_ticket sets no sell or buy legs, limiting paths for later plan readiness like finalize_plan_post_approval.  

## Managing Model Assignments  
- Unassigning and re-assigning target models (e.g., target_model_1 to source_account_1) ensures mapping for matching trade tickets to holdings.  
- Matching trade tickets to holdings sets "matched" status, a prerequisite for finalizing account assignments and achieving readiness for execution.  

## Finalizing Account Readiness  
- Finalizing source and target account assignments requires ticket_marked, ready_for_assembly, created, and matched conditions to be met.  
- Both accounts, once finalized, set ready_for_execution, enabling transition plan execution like transition_plan_alpha.

## Evaluating Compliance Paths  
- Compliance paths for plans like transition_plan_alpha require an operator (e.g., operator_1) assigned, limiting sequential processing to one plan at a time.  
- Plans also need validation, including registration, attaching transition requests, and assigning models, with each step handled one at a time.  

## Exploring Plan Beta Limitations  
- Transition_plan_beta requires compliance_rule_2, but only compliance_rule_1 is available initially, blocking the compliance path.  
- No actions exist to make compliance_rule_2 available, suggesting alternative paths like approval without compliance may be needed.  

## Investigating Trade Ticket Adjustments  
- Current assembly uses no-leg tickets, missing readiness checks for plans; assembling with legs (e.g., assemble_with_both_legs) could address this.  
- Assembling with legs requires source and target buckets to have candidates and not be ready for assembly, but current process sets ready_assembly too early.  

## Reviewing Assembly Prerequisites  
- To assemble with sell legs, target buckets need to be marked, possibly by identifying eligible target buckets or reserving accounts, ensuring validation and mapping.  
- Current flow after attaching candidates leaves source_bucket_has_candidate intact, potentially allowing leg assembly if readiness timing is adjusted.

## Preparing Plan Execution  
- Transition plans like transition_plan_alpha require holding lots and trade tickets to be consumed and assigned, setting the stage for execution readiness.  
- Plans need settlement instructions and operator assignments, both validated and available, to progress toward execution readiness checks.  

## Checking Execution Readiness  
- Execution readiness for plans involves attaching approvals and ensuring conditions like prepared, settlement attached, and operator assigned are met.  
- Once approvals are collected and compliance isn't cleared, plans can be finalized, marking them ready for execution.  

## Attaching Transition Components  
- Attaching transition windows to plans requires readiness for execution and mapping to target models, ensuring plans are set for transition assignments.  
- Assigning transition requests to plans involves window attachment and availability, finalizing the plan as assigned for transition and releasing resources.  

## Managing Resource Release  
- Plans can detach settlement instructions, approvals, and unassign operators and target models to release resources, ensuring flexibility for reassignment.  
- Holding lots, once consumed, remain in use, with no specific release actions noted for them in the current process.

## Registering Portfolios  
- Portfolios like target_account_1 and transition_plan_alpha are detected and registered to begin processing.  
- Transition requests, such as transition_request_b and transition_request_c, are attached to respective portfolios for coordination.  

## Managing Target Models  
- Target models are unassigned from source accounts and reassigned to target accounts or plans as needed, ensuring flexibility.  
- Validation occurs after model assignment to confirm portfolio readiness, such as with target_account_1 and transition_plan_alpha.  

## Preparing Accounts for Assembly  
- Candidate securities are attached and confirmed for both source and target buckets, marking them ready for assembly and ticket marking.  
- Trade tickets are assembled by mapping source and target accounts, ensuring both are prepared for execution through finalized assignments.  

## Binding Plan Resources  
- Holding lots are bound to plans and tickets, consuming resources like holding_lot_1 for transition_plan_alpha and trade_ticket_1.  
- Plans are prepared for venue assignment by ensuring mappings and conditions like no sell_leg are met, setting the stage for further attachments.  

## Finalizing Execution Setup  
- Settlement instructions, operators, and approval documents are attached to plans to meet execution readiness checks.  
- Execution readiness is confirmed for plans like transition_plan_alpha, ensuring all components, including non-buy legs, are ready for approval collection.

## Assigning Transition Resources  
- Transition windows are attached to portfolios like source_account_1, ensuring availability for transition requests.  
- Transition requests, such as transition_request_a, are assigned to source and target accounts, marking them ready for further processing.  

## Managing Target Model Assignments  
- Target models are unassigned from source accounts and reassigned to target accounts, maintaining flexibility in portfolio management.  
- This reassignment ensures portfolios like target_account_1 are prepared for transition window attachments and request assignments.  

## Verifying Plan Conditions  
- Plans require no sell legs and no buy legs for actions like collecting approvals, aligning with the simple assembly approach used.  
- Holding lots, such as holding_lot_2, are bound to tickets without conflicts, supporting multiple assignments as needed for plans like beta.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
